lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉਣੈ ਪਾਣੀ ਅਗਨੀ ਜੀਉ ਤਿਨ ਕਿਆ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਕਿਆ ਪੀੜ ॥
lines.translit: paunai paanee aganee jeeo tin kiaa khuseea kiaa peerr |
lines.english: Living beings are formed of air, water and fire. They are subject to pleasure and pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤੀ ਪਾਤਾਲੀ ਆਕਾਸੀ ਇਕਿ ਦਰਿ ਰਹਨਿ ਵਜੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: dharatee paataalee aakaasee ik dar rehan vajeer |
lines.english: In this world, in the nether regions of the underworld, and in the Akaashic ethers of the heavens, some remain ministers in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਵਡੀ ਆਰਜਾ ਇਕਿ ਮਰਿ ਹੋਹਿ ਜਹੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa vaddee aarajaa ik mar hohi jaheer |
lines.english: Some live long lives, while others suffer and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਦੇ ਖਾਹਿ ਨਿਖੁਟੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਇਕਿ ਸਦਾ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਫਕੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: eik de khaeh nikhuttai naahee ik sadaa fireh fakeer |
lines.english: Some give and consume, and still their wealth is not exhausted, while others remain poor forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਨਥੈ ਨਥਿਆ ਬਖਸੇ ਤੋੜੇ ਨਥ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko nathai nathiaa bakhase torre nath |
lines.english: He has harnessed everyone with His harness; when He forgives, he breaks the harness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਸਾਜੇ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਢਾਹੇ ਏਕ ਚਸੇ ਮਹਿ ਲਖ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee saaje hukamee dtaahe ek chase meh lakh |
lines.english: In His Will He creates, and in His Will He destroys thousands in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣਾ ਕਥਨਾ ਕਾਰ ਸਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਅਕਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: karanaa kathanaa kaar sabh naanak aap akath |
lines.english: All the actions which are done and described, O Nanak, are done by the Indescribable Lord Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਨਾ ਚਿਹਨਾ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਲੇਖੇ ਬਾਝੁ ਅਲਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: varanaa chihanaa baaharaa lekhe baajh alakh |
lines.english: He has no color or features; He is invisible and beyond calculation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਕਥੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਾਪੈ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiau katheeai kiau aakheeai jaapai sacho sach |
lines.english: How can He be described? He is known as the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥ ਕੀ ਕਥਾ ਸੁਣੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: akath kee kathaa sunee |
lines.english: Whoever hears the description of the indescribable,

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਧਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ridh budh sidh giaan sadaa sukh hoe |1|
lines.english: is blessed with wealth, intelligence, perfection, spiritual wisdom and eternal peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜੈ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਹੋਵੈ ਥਿਰੁ ਕੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: poojai praan hovai thir kandh |
lines.english: One who worships and adores the Lord with his breath of life, gains stability in his body-wall.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾਂ ਤੇ ਆਇਆ ਕਹਾਂ ਏਹੁ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: kahaan te aaeaa kahaan ehu jaan |
lines.english: Where has he come from, and where will he go?

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਰੁ ਜਰੈ ਤ ਨਉ ਕੁਲ ਬੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: ajar jarai ta nau kul bandh |
lines.english: One who bears the unbearable, controls the nine holes of the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਪਰਸਾਦੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਤੇ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu parasaad guroo te jaanai |
lines.english: This is known by Guru's Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰਤ ਰਹੈ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat marat rahai paravaan |
lines.english: Remaining dead while yet alive, he is accepted and approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਂਦਾ ਫੜੀਅਗੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: hondaa farreeag naanak jaan |
lines.english: O Nanak, know this: egotism leads to bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਤਤੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukamai boojhai tat pachhaanai |
lines.english: Whoever understands the Hukam of the Lord's Command, realizes the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਹਉ ਨਾ ਮੈ ਜੂਨੀ ਪਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naa hau naa mai joonee paan |2|
lines.english: Only those who have no ego and no self-conceit, are not consigned to reincarnation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜੑੀਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਲਾਹ ਹੋਰਿ ਬੁਧਂ‍ੀ ਮਿਥਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: parraeeai naam saalaah hor budhanee mithiaa |
lines.english: Read the Praise of the Lord's Name; other intellectual pursuits are false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਗਰਬਿ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਤਿਨ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag garab gubaar tin sach na bhaaeaa |
lines.english: All the world is enveloped by the darkness of egotistical pride. It does not like the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਕਿਨ ਹੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ant na paaraavaar na kin hee paaeaa |
lines.english: No one has ever found the Lord's end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਚੇ ਵਾਪਾਰ ਜਨਮੁ ਬਿਰਥਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin sache vaapaar janam birathiaa |
lines.english: Without dealing in Truth, life is worthless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਦੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਤੇਲੁ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਘਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: baladee andar tel dubidhaa ghatiaa |
lines.english: They pour the oil of duality within, and burn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਤਾਵਣਿ ਤਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: chale naam visaar taavan tatiaa |
lines.english: Those who depart from this world, forgetting the Naam, shall be roasted in the frying pan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੈ ਮੇਲੁ ਸਚੈ ਰਤਿਆ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naanak sachai mel sachai ratiaa |24|
lines.english: O Nanak, imbued with Truth, the mortals merge in Truth. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲਾਂ ਮਾਸਹੁ ਨਿੰਮਿਆ ਮਾਸੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: pahilaan maasahu ninmiaa maasai andar vaas |
lines.english: First, the mortal is conceived in the flesh, and then he dwells in the flesh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਆ ਉਠੀ ਖੇਲੁ ਫਿਰੈ ਉਵਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aaeaa utthee khel firai uvatiaa |
lines.english: They come into the world and wander around aimlessly; they depart when the play is finished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਾਇ ਮਾਸੁ ਮੁਹਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਡੁ ਚੰਮੁ ਤਨੁ ਮਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo paae maas muhi miliaa hadd cham tan maas |
lines.english: When he comes alive, his mouth takes flesh; his bones, skin and body are flesh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਸਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਢਿਆ ਮੰਮਾ ਮਾਸੁ ਗਿਰਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: maasahu baahar kadtiaa mamaa maas giraas |
lines.english: He comes out of the womb of flesh, and takes a mouthful of flesh at the breast.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਹੋਆ ਵੀਆਹਿਆ ਘਰਿ ਲੈ ਆਇਆ ਮਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa hoaa veeaahiaa ghar lai aaeaa maas |
lines.english: He grows up and is married, and brings his wife of flesh into his home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹੁ ਮਾਸੈ ਕਾ ਜੀਭ ਮਾਸੈ ਕੀ ਮਾਸੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: muhu maasai kaa jeebh maasai kee maasai andar saas |
lines.english: His mouth is flesh, his tongue is flesh; his breath is in the flesh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਸਹੁ ਹੀ ਮਾਸੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਮਾਸਹੁ ਸਭੋ ਸਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: maasahu hee maas aoopajai maasahu sabho saak |
lines.english: Flesh is produced from flesh; all relatives are made of flesh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਤਾਂ ਕੋ ਆਵੈ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai hukam bujheeai taan ko aavai raas |
lines.english: When the mortal meets the True Guru, and realizes the Hukam of the Lord's Command, then he comes to be reformed.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਛੁਟੇ ਨਹ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਚਨਿ ਬਿਣਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aap chhutte neh chhootteeai naanak bachan binaas |1|
lines.english: Releasing himself, the mortal does not find release; O Nanak, through empty words, one is ruined. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਸੁ ਮਾਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਝਗੜੇ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: maas maas kar moorakh jhagarre giaan dhiaan nahee jaanai |
lines.english: The fools argue about flesh and meat, but they know nothing about meditation and spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਮਾਸੁ ਕਉਣੁ ਸਾਗੁ ਕਹਾਵੈ ਕਿਸੁ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਪ ਸਮਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaun maas kaun saag kahaavai kis meh paap samaane |
lines.english: What is called meat, and what is called green vegetables? What leads to sin?

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੜੁ ਕਰਿ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨੋ ਦਿਖਲਾਵਹਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: farr kar lokaan no dikhalaaveh giaan dhiaan nahee soojhai |
lines.english: They practice hypocrisy, and make a show before other people, but they do not understand anything about meditation or spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਸੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਬੈਸਿ ਨਕੁ ਪਕੜਹਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਾਣਸ ਖਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: maas chhodd bais nak pakarreh raatee maanas khaane |
lines.english: Those who renounce meat, and hold their noses when sitting near it, devour men at night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੈਂਡਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਹੋਮ ਜਗ ਕੀਏ ਦੇਵਤਿਆ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: gainddaa maar hom jag kee devatiaa kee baane |
lines.english: It was the habit of the gods to kill the rhinoceros, and make a feast of the burnt offering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਧੇ ਸਿਉ ਕਿਆ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਹੈ ਨ ਕਹਿਆ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak andhe siau kiaa kaheeai kahai na kahiaa boojhai |
lines.english: O Nanak, what can be said to the blind people? They cannot answer, or even understand what is said.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਕੀ ਰਕਤੁ ਨਿਪੰਨੇ ਮਛੀ ਮਾਸੁ ਨ ਖਾਂਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa kee rakat nipane machhee maas na khaanhee |
lines.english: They are produced from the blood of their mothers and fathers, but they do not eat fish or meat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਾ ਸੋਇ ਜਿ ਅੰਧੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਿ ਲੋਚਨ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: andhaa soe ji andh kamaavai tis ridai si lochan naahee |
lines.english: They alone are blind, who act blindly. They have no eyes in their hearts.
